chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 64 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1) For Order on CMA No. 457/2025 (Urgent) 2) For Order on CMA No. 485/2025 (Application for Condonation) 3) For Order on Office Objection a/w reply as at “A”. Nos 4) For Order on CMA No. 458/2025 (Exemption/App) 5) For hearing of main case. 6) For Order on CMA No. 459/2025 (Stay/App) ------------ 20.03.2025. Mr. Moulvi Iqbal Haider, Advocate for Appellants. -------------------- 1. Granted. 2,3,4,5,6. After being confronted as to delay in filing of this appeal, learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press the same along with listed applications. Order accordingly. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
